message:
fix(release): lower glibc floor and eliminate OpenSSL dependency (#109)

- Build Linux x86_64 on ubuntu-22.04 (glibc 2.35) instead of
  ubuntu-latest (glibc 2.39), broadening binary compatibility to
  Ubuntu 22.04+, Debian 12+, Fedora 36+
- Switch fastembed from ort-download-binaries (native-tls/OpenSSL)
  to ort-download-binaries-rustls-tls, eliminating the dynamic
  libssl.so.3/libcrypto.so.3 dependency entirely

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,8 +33,8 @@ jobs:
       fail-fast: false
       matrix:
         include:
-          # Linux x86_64
-          - os: ubuntu-latest
+          # Linux x86_64 — use ubuntu-22.04 (glibc 2.35) for broader compatibility
+          - os: ubuntu-22.04
             target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
             artifact_name: cass
             asset_name: cass-linux-amd64
